verdict.answer_first: B ties A on first-line bottom line, but is tighter: "POST is triggering a CORS preflight and your GET isn't"; A also leads well: "POST triggers a CORS preflight".
verdict.decisiveness: B gives one clear prescription: "fix is on the server: make it respond to the OPTIONS request"; A adds a side experiment and extra framework prompt, which dilutes slightly.
verdict.actionability: B is easier to execute because it names the required server behavior plus status: "respond to the OPTIONS request (status 200/204)" and lists exact headers without overexplaining.
